executive_verdict.primary_failure_mode: Architecture-owned localization is working again, but the marketing owner loop is still independently red while primary-repo adoption remains measurement-pending during an active hold window.
executive_verdict.most_urgent_fix: Let the active measurement hold expire, then use the scheduled post-hold marketing rerun to produce fresh outcome evidence and rerun independent marketing plus architecture verification.

live_running_job_names: Push research findings to git repo

owns: The live Gateway-owned verifier-supervisor job is the scheduler authority for this docs loop; direct user crontab entries must remain absent.

findings.title: Marketing remains the only live red owner loop
findings.mechanism: marketing independent verification still fails while the refreshed runner, momentum watchdog, and workflow audit all agree that primary-repo adoption is still measurement-pending.
findings.root_cause: The active marketing hold window has not produced new outcome movement yet, so independent certification correctly stays closed.
findings.recommended_fix: Wait for the hold release job, then rerun marketing on fresh outcome evidence and only recertify if the independent verifier passes.

findings.title: Architecture audit was stale against live Gateway topology until this refresh
findings.mechanism: live runtime now exposes 22 enabled jobs, not 21, because two marketing-measurement-hold-release one-shots are present.
findings.root_cause: The previous architecture artifact predated the newest one-shot release scheduling and fell out of sync with live runtime state.
findings.recommended_fix: Keep architecture artifacts tied to live cron state and watch the duplicate release jobs until one ages out or is explicitly deduped.

findings.title: Marketing checker had two false-localization paths that are now repaired
findings.mechanism: it treated a blocked-skip Reddit packet as a stale required artifact and also rejected measurement_hold_active as an unexpected watch action.
findings.root_cause: The checker contract had not been updated to match the newer blocked-channel and hold-window runtime truth model.
findings.recommended_fix: No further architecture repair needed unless the marketing checker drifts again.

findings.title: Docs remains green and independently stable
findings.mechanism: docs verifier remains pass and loop integrity reports the docs watchdog as ok.
findings.root_cause: The docs owner loop is currently aligned across checker, verifier, and stability history.

findings.title: Live scheduler is otherwise clean
findings.mechanism: 22 live jobs, 22 enabled, 0 disabled, no live last-error residue.
findings.root_cause: Current cron state is stable aside from the measurement-release duplication watchpoint.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Keep architecture signoff aligned with the current 22-job live topology and repaired checker contract
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: This removes the local architecture false-red loop and restores truthful blocker localization.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Architecture verifier can return to qualified-pass once rerun against this refreshed artifact.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Let the active marketing hold complete and rely on the scheduled post-hold rerun for new outcome evidence
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Marketing is still the only live red owner domain and current evidence is explicitly measurement-pending.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Either clears the remaining owner-loop blocker or produces a cleaner next repair target.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Deduplicate or naturally retire extra marketing-measurement-hold-release one-shots after the active window
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Two identically named release jobs now exist in live runtime, which is manageable but worth explicit tracking.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Prevents quiet topology drift from reappearing as an architecture mismatch.

repairs_applied_this_run.change: Stopped treating the intentionally absent Reddit next-window packet as missing/stale when runtime truth is channel_blocked_skip.
Added measurement_hold_active to the certifiable watch-action allowlist so the checker reports the real blocker instead of a contract false positive.
Reran the marketing bundle and loop-integrity audit so the live marketing blocker is now localized as measurement_pending primary-repo flatness rather than stale-packet noise.
Rebased the architecture audit on the current 22-job live Gateway topology, including the duplicate marketing measurement-release one-shots now present in runtime.

independent_verification.summary: Independent verification confirms the repaired architecture verifier now fails closed on stale signoff, the live loop topology/ownership checks remain green, and shared market-intelligence reuse stays machine-verifiable.

what_still_needs_independent_verificatio: Fresh marketing independent pass after the active measurement hold yields new outcome evidence.

highest_risk_unresolved_issue.title: Marketing remains red on outcome evidence
highest_risk_unresolved_issue.why: Architecture can now localize the blocker correctly, but it cannot certify system health until marketing exits measurement_pending with real adoption movement or a new hard failure.

live_running_job_names: Push research findings to git repo

notes: Architecture green here means architecture-owned localization is healthy, not that the marketing owner loop is globally green.
Persisted disabled jobs are history only; live disabled jobs are zero.
Two live marketing-measurement-hold-release one-shot jobs are currently present and counted in live topology.
The repaired marketing checker now surfaces the real measurement-pending blocker instead of stale Reddit-packet noise.
